_comment: ARCHITECTURE (topology) anti-overfit demonstrator. The BRIEF tells the model the VISIBLE workload (the two-qubit interaction pairs an AI primitive needs) and asks for a 4-qubit hardware coupling map under a degree<=2 connectivity budget. The judge HOLDS OUT a second workload. A ring topology routes both cheaply (generalizes); a linear-path topology overfit to the visible disjoint pairs blows the held-out cross-pair budget and is REJECTED at exit 6.
